tests.name: framework_self_guard_active

tests.name: start_phase1_exits_zero
tests.details: process-checklist.sh --start-phase1 exited 0

tests.name: phase1_steps_array_present
tests.details: .phase1_architecture.steps_completed exists in process-state.json

tests.name: each_phase1_step_completes
tests.details: All 5 PHASE1_STEPS (architecture_selected, threat_model_complete, data_model_defined, ui_scaffolding_done, bible_synthesized) completed in sequence

tests.name: phase1_to_phase2_gate_passes
tests.details: check-gate.sh --preflight reported '[FAIL] Not ready: protection verification failed' on fake remote. Expected for fake/example.com URL since branch protection cannot be verified. Soft-failure was attested via --branch-protection-attested at init time, but check-gate.sh re-verifies and rejects on real probe. check-phase-gate.sh reports 'Phase gates consistent' but never advances current_phase.

tests.name: phase_state_advances_to_2
tests.details: U-D regression confirmed: no script auto-advances .current_phase after gate completion. .current_phase remained 0 after all phase 1 steps completed. Recorded as Medium per runbook (known-open prior-sweep bug).

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after gate passes
framework_bugs.reproduction: bash $FRAMEWORK/scripts/process-checklist.sh --start-phase1; complete all PHASE1_STEPS via --complete-step phase1_architecture:<step>; bash $FRAMEWORK/scripts/check-phase-gate.sh; jq .current_phase .claude/phase-state.json
framework_bugs.expected: After all phase 1 steps complete + phase gate passes, .current_phase should advance to 1 (and similarly progress to 2 once cross-gate succeeds)
framework_bugs.actual: .current_phase remains 0 throughout. No documented script auto-advances the phase pointer.

documentation_gaps.gap: check-gate.sh --preflight rejects 'other' git host with fake remote even when --branch-protection-attested was passed at init time. The protection verification path does not consult the attestation flag persisted in the manifest.

tests.name: start_feature_records_state
tests.details: .build_loop.feature = uat-feat-1 after --start-feature

tests.name: each_step_completes_in_order
tests.details: tests_written -> tests_verified_failing -> implemented -> security_audit -> documentation_updated all completed sequentially

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop
tests.details: git commit -m 'feat(uat-1): stub feature for UAT' succeeded after build loop completed

tests.name: bl006_blocks_feat_without_loop
tests.details: U-C confirmation: direct shell `git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop'` succeeded with exit 0. BL-006 enforcement only fires through the PreToolUse hook in Claude Code; shell-direct commits bypass it. This is the still-open U-C bug, not a new regression.

tests.name: bl006_grace_window_resets_after_record
tests.details: After --record-feature uat-feat-1 + --complete-step build_loop:feature_recorded, started uat-feat-2, completed full build loop, and `git commit -m 'feat(uat-2): another stub'` succeeded. The grace window reset behavior (PR #17) appears intact.

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_blocks_commit
tests.details: Wrote .claude/pending-approval.json then invoked pre-commit-gate.sh with stdin payload {tool_input:{command:'git commit -m foo'}}; gate returned permissionDecision='deny' with sentinel message. PreToolUse path correctly blocks.

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_resolves
tests.details: scripts/pending-approval.sh --resolve removed sentinel; subsequent pre-commit-gate.sh invocation produced no deny decision.

tests.name: recorded_feature_appears_in_progress
tests.details: jq .features_completed .claude/build-progress.json contains 'uat-feat-1' (and 'uat-feat-2' after second record)

framework_bugs.summary: U-C confirmation: shell-direct git commit bypasses BL-006 / pre-commit-gate
framework_bugs.reproduction: Without --start-feature, run: git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop'
framework_bugs.expected: Some local mechanism (git commit-msg hook or pre-commit hook installed in .git/hooks) should reject feat: subjects when no Build Loop is active
framework_bugs.actual: Commit succeeds because no .git/hooks/commit-msg is installed; PreToolUse-only enforcement is bypassed by direct shell. Known-open U-C from prior sweep.

tests.name: start_phase3_exits_zero
tests.details: process-checklist.sh --start-phase3 exited 0 (with warnings about features-since-last-UAT)

tests.name: start_uat_creates_session
tests.details: .uat_session.started_at non-null after --start-uat 1

tests.name: uat_template_lints_clean
tests.details: scripts/lint-uat-scenarios.sh reported 'All 1 scenarios clean.' (exit 0) after a hand-crafted populated HTML scenario file. Note: required steps to be a single \n-delimited string rather than a JSON array; running the linter directly on the unpopulated framework template tests/uat/test-session-template.html surfaces 21 placeholder violations, which is correct.

tests.name: each_uat_step_completes
tests.details: All 9 UAT_STEPS (agents_dispatched -> gate_passed) completed sequentially with --complete-step uat_session:<step>

tests.name: phase3_to_phase4_gate
tests.details: Phase 3 gate is implicitly enforced by --start-phase4 attempting to advance; this returned a clean BLOCK on sponsored_poc projects (see Phase 4 below). All 9 PHASE3_STEPS marked complete with stub test-results artifacts.

documentation_gaps.gap: lint-uat-scenarios.sh expects scenarios[].steps to be a string with embedded \n; the framework template's intended schema (and the documented '__SCENARIOS_JSON__' shape) is unclear. A successful lint run requires scenarios[].steps to be a single string starting with one of: 'You are', 'cd ', 'Setup:', 'Before starting', 'Preconditions:'. This is not documented near the linter or the template.

tests.name: start_phase4_exits_zero
tests.details: Correctly BLOCKED for sponsored_poc: 'Phase 4 (production release) is blocked — project is in sponsored poc mode' with exit 1. This is the documented governance gate, not a bug. Phase 4 is N/A for sponsored_poc until upgrade-project.sh --to-production is run.

tests.name: each_phase4_step_completes
tests.details: N/A for sponsored_poc — Phase 4 entry blocked by governance gate. Skipped per scenario design.

tests.name: handoff_md_required
tests.details: N/A for sponsored_poc — Phase 4 not entered. Skipped per scenario design.

tests.name: release_notes_required
tests.details: N/A for sponsored_poc — Phase 4 not entered. Skipped per scenario design.

tests.name: phase4_completion_state
tests.details: N/A for sponsored_poc — phase 4 is not reachable without --to-production upgrade. Final .current_phase = 0 (consistent with U-D non-advancement).

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: Targeted grep for 'password=|api_key=|secret=|token=' patterns across committed non-doc/non-script files returned 0 hits. Generic substring matches in framework docs/scripts are documentation about secrets, not actual secrets.

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: N/A — .claude/process-audit.log does not exist; no FORCE/reset events occurred during this run, which is expected.

tests.name: no_orphaned_tempfiles
tests.details: find $WORKDIR/.claude -name '*.tmp' returned no results

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK status --short shows only pre-existing untracked items (.claude/, Reports/uat-2026-04-26/) — no tracked-file modifications. HEAD SHA d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494 unchanged.

summary: Sponsored-POC web/full base-agent run: init non-interactive succeeded with --git-host other; sentinel + grace-window fixes confirmed; Phase 4 correctly blocked by governance; U-C and U-D re-confirmed (Medium) per prior-sweep triage; one doc gap on UAT linter schema and one on check-gate protection-attestation handling.
